prompt: Can you start indexing the codebase so we can query functions and modules?
setup: Clean graph. Hooks do not fire in subagent environment. Claude should check vulcan_ingest_status before starting, then call vulcan_ingest_git if idle.
assertions: Claude calls vulcan_ingest_status before attempting to start ingestion
Claude calls vulcan_ingest_git only if status shows ingestion is not already running
Claude does not attempt to manually store code entities via vulcan_transact
Claude informs the user that ingestion runs in the background
Claude does not block or claim to wait — it starts the job and moves on
